description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Buy 4 tickets for the Haunted Maze on October 29 using the cheapest evening timeslot and promo code
tasks.description: Purchase exactly 4 tickets for the 'Haunted Maze' attraction on October 29, selecting the cheapest available timeslot that starts after 6:00 PM, and apply the promo code 'BRAIN10' before proceeding to checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Tickets' option in the main navigation menu.
On the tickets page, click the 'Haunted Maze' attraction card.
Use the date picker to select October 29 as the event date.
In the time-of-day filter, select the option that shows only evening times, such as 'Evening (after 6:00 PM)'.
Open the sort dropdown and choose 'Price: Low to High' to sort timeslots by price.
Click the first available timeslot in the sorted list (the cheapest evening slot).
In the ticket quantity selector, set the number of tickets to 4.
In the promo code field, type 'BRAIN10' and click the 'Apply' button.
Click the 'Proceed to checkout' button to move to the checkout page with these tickets.

tasks.name: Create a 3-item zombie apparel bundle under $25 each with high ratings and venue pickup
tasks.description: Build a custom bundle of exactly 3 zombie-themed apparel items, each priced at $25 or less and rated 4 stars or higher, add them to the cart, and set delivery to 'Pick up at event venue'.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Merch' or 'Shop' link in the main navigation.
On the shop page, click the 'Apparel' category to show clothing items.
In the price filter controls, set the maximum price to $25.
In the rating filter, select the option for '4 stars & up'.
In the merchandise search bar, type 'zombie' and submit the search to show only zombie-related apparel.
From the filtered results, click the first product card, set the quantity to 1 on its product page, and click the 'Add to cart' button.
Use the breadcrumb or browser back button to return to the filtered apparel list, then click the second product card, set the quantity to 1, and add it to the cart.
Return again to the filtered results list, click the third product card, set the quantity to 1, and add it to the cart.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page and in the delivery options section select 'Pick up at event venue' as the delivery method.

tasks.name: Book group tickets for 8 friends across two different attractions on Halloween night after 8 PM
tasks.description: For October 31, add 4 tickets to the Haunted Maze after 8:00 PM and 4 tickets to the Zombie Escape Room after 9:00 PM, so that the group experiences two different attractions in one night, then view both in the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Tickets' option in the main navigation menu.
Use the date selector on the tickets page to choose October 31.
Click the 'Haunted Maze' attraction card for that date.
In the time filter, select 'Start after 8:00 PM', then click the first available timeslot shown, set the ticket quantity to 4, and click 'Add to cart'.
Use the 'All Attractions' link or site navigation to go back to the list of attractions for October 31.
Click the 'Zombie Escape Room' attraction card.
In the time filter, select 'Start after 9:00 PM' to ensure the second activity is later.
Click the first available timeslot displayed, set the ticket quantity to 4, and click the 'Add to cart' button.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page and view both attractions with their quantities.

tasks.name: Plan a 3-event evening schedule on October 30 between 5 PM and 10 PM
tasks.description: Use the event calendar to select three different events on October 30 that occur between 5:00 PM and 10:00 PM, add each of them to 'My Night Plan', and then open the plan page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Schedule' or 'Event Calendar' link in the main navigation.
In the calendar date picker, select October 30.
In the time range filter, set the start time to 5:00 PM and the end time to 10:00 PM.
From the events list for that time range, click the first event and on its detail page click the 'Add to My Night Plan' button.
Click the 'Back to calendar' link or use the navigation to return to the October 30 event list.
Scroll down and click the next event whose title is different from the first one you chose, then click 'Add to My Night Plan' on its detail page.
Return again to the event calendar and select a third event with a title different from the first two, then click 'Add to My Night Plan' on that event's page.
Click the 'My Night Plan' or 'My Schedule' link in the header to open the page showing your planned events.

tasks.name: Save 5 kid-friendly low-scare attractions to your favorites
tasks.description: Find attractions that are tagged as kid-friendly with scare levels 1–3 and age ratings of 'All ages' or '10+', save the first five results to your favorites, and open the favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Attractions' or 'Experiences' option in the main navigation.
In the tags or categories filter, select the 'Kid-friendly' option.
Use the scare level filter (slider or checkboxes) to limit results to scare levels 1 through 3.
In the age rating filter, select both 'All ages' and '10+' so that only those age groups are shown.
Scroll through the resulting list and click the heart or 'Save' icon on the first five attraction cards in order.
Click the 'Saved', 'Favorites', or similar link in the header or sidebar to open the page listing your saved attractions.

tasks.name: Reserve a VIP Zombie Escape Room session for 2 players before 7 PM on November 1 with a photo package add-on
tasks.description: Book a VIP version of the Zombie Escape Room for 2 players on November 1, choosing the earliest available timeslot before 7:00 PM, and add the 'Photo & Video Package' before going to checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Tickets' or 'Book Now' link in the main navigation, then select the 'Zombie Escape Room' attraction from the list.
On the Zombie Escape Room page, choose the 'VIP' ticket option or enable the VIP toggle in the ticket type section.
Use the date picker to select November 1 as the date.
In the time filter, select 'Before 7:00 PM' to limit sessions to earlier times.
Open the sort dropdown and choose 'Earliest time first', then click the first timeslot that appears.
In the party size or guest count field, set the number of players to 2.
On the add-ons section, check the box for the 'Photo & Video Package' option.
Click the 'Reserve Now' or 'Continue to checkout' button to move forward with this booking.

tasks.name: Add a parking pass within 500 m of the Quarantine Zone Arena for October 31 at 7 PM
tasks.description: Using the interactive map, find a parking area within 500 meters of the 'Quarantine Zone Arena', select the first matching option, and add a parking pass for October 31 at 7:00 PM to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Map & Parking' or 'Map' link in the main navigation.
In the map search bar, type 'Quarantine Zone Arena' and submit the search.
Click on the 'Quarantine Zone Arena' pin on the map or its name in the search results list.
In the venue details panel, click the 'Find nearby parking' button.
In the parking filters, set the maximum distance to '500 m' or select the '< 500 m' distance option.
From the filtered list of parking areas, click the first result to open its parking details panel or page.
Click the 'Add Parking Pass' or similarly labeled button on the parking details view.
In the pass options form, select October 31 as the date and choose '7:00 PM' as the arrival time.
Click the 'Add to cart' button to add this parking pass to your shopping cart.

tasks.name: Register for a free Zombie Makeup Workshop for a group of 3 on an afternoon between October 28–30
tasks.description: Find a free, family-friendly 'Zombie Makeup Workshop' scheduled between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM on any date from October 28 to October 30, and complete a registration form for 3 attendees using the given contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Workshops & Shows' or 'Workshops' link in the main navigation.
In the price filter section, set the maximum price to $0 or select the 'Free events' checkbox.
In the date range filter, select dates from October 28 through October 30.
In the time range filter, set the start time to 1:00 PM and the end time to 4:00 PM, then in the tags filter select 'Family-friendly'.
From the filtered list, scroll until you see an event with 'Zombie Makeup Workshop' in its title and click that event card.
On the workshop detail page, click the 'Register Free' button.
In the registration form, enter 'Alex Carter' in the full name field, 'alex@example.com' in the email field, '555-0123' in the phone field, and set the party size or number of attendees to 3.
If there is a newsletter signup checkbox, leave it unchecked, then click the 'Submit registration' button to complete the registration.
